entries.title: Favicon Privacy Leak Inspector
entries.notes: Uses browser's built-in webRequest API to intercept favicon network calls. Compares favicon sources against known privacy-respecting providers. Easy to build with declarativeNetRequest rules.
entries.pain: Users don't know their browsing history is exposed when favicon services leak DNS queries to third parties.

entries.title: PR Description Readability Calculator
entries.notes: Leverages Flesch-Kincaid readability scoring on PR descriptions. Integrates with GitHub PR UI. Could offer templates as premium tier.
entries.pain: Pull request descriptions are often poorly written, making code reviews slower and less effective.

entries.title: Salesforce Task Deadline Countdown
entries.notes: Injects countdown timers on Salesforce task pages. Uses Salesforce Canvas or Chrome extension storage sync. Simple UI overlay makes it trivial to build.
entries.pain: Sales reps miss task deadlines because they can't quickly see time remaining without opening Salesforce.

entries.title: WebPage WCAG Contrast Batch Auditor
entries.notes: Scans all text/background color pairs on a page against WCAG 2.1 guidelines. Highlights failing elements. Could be enhanced with AI suggestions.
entries.pain: Designers and developers manually check contrast ratios for each element instead of all at once.

entries.title: CI Pipeline Run Annotation Tool
entries.notes: Adds annotation UI to common CI systems via their APIs. Stores notes in extension sync storage or connects to Notion. Buildable in under 3 weeks.
entries.pain: Engineers lose context about why a build failed because notes aren't attached to pipeline runs.

entries.title: Notion Page Block Composition Analyzer
entries.notes: Parses Notion page DOM to count block types. Shows pie chart of content composition. Uses MutationObserver for live updates.
entries.pain: Users don't realize their Notion pages are bloated with too many embeds or databases that slow them down.

entries.title: Browser Download Activity Timeline
entries.notes: Uses chrome.downloads API to build a searchable timeline of downloads. Adds tags and notes. Privacy-focused with local-only storage.
entries.pain: No way to see download patterns over time without manually checking Downloads folder repeatedly.

entries.title: Meeting Series Pattern Detector
entries.notes: Analyzes Google Calendar events via API to detect recurring patterns. Groups related meetings visually. Simple calendar sync needed.
entries.pain: Professionals can't easily see which meetings repeat and what their cadence is without calendar hopping.

entries.title: Email Response Likelihood Forecaster
entries.notes: Analyzes email thread characteristics (length, subject, time sent) to score reply probability. Works with Gmail API. Freemium model with daily limit.
entries.pain: Sales reps waste time following up on emails that were never going to get replies in the first place.

entries.title: CSS Custom Property Adoption Map
entries.notes: Scrapes all CSS custom properties from stylesheets and checks usage across page DOM. Visualizes adoption rate. Useful for design system audits.
entries.pain: Design systems define CSS variables that developers rarely use, creating dead weight in the codebase.

entries.title: Tab Memory Consumption Leaderboard
entries.notes: Uses performance.measureUserAgentSpecificMemory() API to rank tabs. Shows RAM usage per tab with one-click close for heavy ones.
entries.pain: Users have no visibility into which tabs consume the most memory without developer tools.

entries.title: JSON Schema Alignment Status Badge
entries.notes: Parses page network responses for JSON and validates against loaded schemas. Shows green/red badge in extension icon. Supports JSON Schema draft-07.
entries.pain: Developers can't quickly tell if API responses on a page match their expected JSON schema.

entries.title: LinkedIn Connection Engagement Tracker
entries.notes: Tracks profile visits, reactions, and comments on connection content. Stores locally with optional sync. Built with LinkedIn's public data.
entries.pain: Sales reps don't know which LinkedIn connections are most active, making outreach prioritization guesswork.

entries.title: GCP Compute Type Launch History
entries.notes: Queries GCP Logging API for compute instances. Shows history with filters. Can also set budget alerts per machine type.
entries.pain: DevOps engineers keep forgetting which machine types they've used before, leading to inconsistent infra spend.

entries.title: Gong Call Topic Drift Analyzer
entries.notes: Ingests Gong transcripts via API, runs basic NLP to detect topic changes. Visualizes as a timeline. Gong API access required.
entries.pain: Sales managers can't quickly see if calls stayed on topic or drifted into off-agenda discussions.
